title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> “Did You Know?” facts &amp tiny writi
content:
✔ “Did You Know?” facts & tiny writing tips placed logically throughout.
✔ A structured “Weekly Narrative Setting” (each week takes place in a themed literary world).
✔ A “Sub-Setting” for each section within that weekly world.

Example: Week 5 – The Realist Novel & Mass Media

📜 Overall Setting: “A 19th-Century Printing Press, Ink-Stained & Clattering with Stories”
✔ Section 1 – Work & Society: The factory floor, where stories are produced en masse.
✔ Section 2 – Historical Anchor: A smoky editorial office, where the truth is debated.
✔ Section 3 – Medium is the Message: The newsroom, where information warps before reaching readers.
✔ Section 4 – Sharpening the Craft: The quiet study of an aspiring writer, attempting to shape reality.

✅ Why This Works:
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 126 (chunk 126/555)
